spec.rawSql: SELECT avg(value) as cpu_load FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
SELECT avg(value) as redis_mem FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'redis.memory.used' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(s.unix_milli)) AS time, avg(s.value) as cpu FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'container.cpu.usage.total' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'container.name') IN ('portainer', 'grafana', 'signoz', 'signoz-otel-collector', 'signoz-zookeeper-1', 'nginx-proxy-manager', 'dozzle', 'uptime-kuma') AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time, JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'container.name') ORDER BY time
SELECT count() as restarts FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE (body LIKE '%restart%' OR body LIKE '%Restarting%') AND timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR) * 1000
SELECT count() as errors FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE severity_text IN ('ERROR', 'FATAL', 'error', 'fatal') AND timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(s.unix_milli)) AS time, avg(s.value) as ram FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'container.memory.usage.total' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time, JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'container.name') ORDER BY time
SELECT avg(value) as redis_keys FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'redis.db.keys' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as load_1m FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as load_5m FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'system.cpu.load_average.5m' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as load_15m FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'system.cpu.load_average.15m' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(s.unix_milli)) AS time, JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'cpu.state') as state, avg(s.value) as cpu_time FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'system.cpu.time' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time, state ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as heap_used FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'scraper_node_nodejs_heap_size_used_bytes' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as heap_total FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'scraper_node_nodejs_heap_size_total_bytes' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as external_mem FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'scraper_node_nodejs_external_memory_bytes' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as p99_lag FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'scraper_node_nodejs_eventloop_lag_p99_seconds' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfHour(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(s.unix_milli)) AS time, avg(s.value) as disk_used FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'system.filesystem.usage' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'device') = '/dev/sda1' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'state') = 'used' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as disk_io FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'system.disk.io_time' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT substring(query, 1, 120) as query_preview, calls, round(total_exec_time::numeric, 2) as total_ms, round(mean_exec_time::numeric, 2) as mean_ms, round(max_exec_time::numeric, 2) as max_ms FROM pg_stat_statements ORDER BY mean_exec_time DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT avg(s.value) as ram_used FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'system.memory.usage' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'state') = 'used' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(s.unix_milli)) AS time, avg(s.value) as cpu FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'container.cpu.usage.total' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time, JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'container.name') ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(s.unix_milli)) AS time, avg(s.value) as ram FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'container.memory.usage.total' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time, JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'container.name') ORDER BY time
SELECT count() as errors FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE severity_text IN ('ERROR', 'FATAL', 'error', 'fatal') AND timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000
SELECT count() as warnings FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE severity_text IN ('WARN', 'warn') AND timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000

SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) as time, severity_text, substring(body, 1, 200) as message FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE (body LIKE '%healthcheck%' OR body LIKE '%copy stream failed%' OR body LIKE '%exec failed%') AND timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000000000 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT avg(s.value) as disk_used FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'system.filesystem.usage' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'device') = '/dev/sda1' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'state') = 'used' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as cpu_load FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(s.unix_milli)) AS time, avg(s.value) as ram_used FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'system.memory.usage' AND JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'state') = 'used' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT JSONExtractString(t.labels, 'container.name') as container, avg(s.value) as ram_bytes FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 s JOIN signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 t ON s.fingerprint = t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name = 'container.memory.usage.total' AND s.unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000 GROUP BY t.fingerprint, container ORDER BY ram_bytes DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) as time, severity_text, substring(body, 1, 200) as message FROM signoz_logs.logs_v2 WHERE severity_text IN ('ERROR', 'FATAL', 'fatal', 'error') AND timestamp >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR) * 1000000000 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT toStartOfMinute(fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(unix_milli)) AS time, avg(value) as pg_conn FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'postgresql.backends' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT sum(ram) as docker_ram FROM (SELECT fingerprint, avg(value) as ram FROM signoz_metrics.samples_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'container.memory.usage.total' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000 GROUP BY fingerprint)
